name: Margaret Gomez Campaign
resolved_employer: Campaign committee of Margaret Gómez, Travis County Commissioner for Precinct 4 (1995-2026); previously Travis County Constable Pct. 4, 1980-1993
evidence: This is a political committee, not an individual. Margaret Gómez held the Travis County Precinct 4 commissioner seat from 1995 until retiring at the end of her term in 2026, and was the first Latina elected to the Commissioners Court; she served as Pct. 4 constable 1980-1993 before resigning to run for commissioner. The committee's transfers corroborate the identification: it gave to County Judge Andy Brown and to George Morales, the former county constable who won the 2026 Democratic primary runoff to succeed her in Pct. 4 — candidate-to-candidate transfers to an ally and a designated successor. South Austin 78704 is inside Pct. 4.

affiliations.role: Commissioner 1995-2026 (first Latina elected to the court); Travis County Constable Pct. 4, 1980-1993
